reports.title: Total Hosts
reports.query: MATCH (h:Host) RETURN count(h) AS total_hosts

reports.title: Active Vulnerabilities
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) RETURN count(v) AS total_vulns

reports.title: Crown Jewel Assets
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true}) RETURN count(d) AS crown_jewels

reports.title: Pending Actions
reports.query: MATCH (ac:ActionCard {status: 'pending'}) RETURN count(ac) AS pending_actions

reports.title: Vulnerability Severity Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (v:Vulnerability) WITH CASE WHEN v.cvss >= 9.0 THEN 'Critical' WHEN v.cvss >= 7.0 THEN 'High' WHEN v.cvss >= 4.0 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END AS severity RETURN severity, count(*) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

reports.title: ActionCard Status Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (ac:ActionCard) RETURN ac.status AS status, count(*) AS count

reports.title: Most Vulnerable Hosts
reports.query: MATCH (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WITH h, count(v) AS vuln_count ORDER BY vuln_count DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN h.hostname AS hostname, h.ip AS ip_address, vuln_count

reports.title: Crown Jewel Data Assets
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true})-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) RETURN d.location_pseudonym AS asset_location, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity, h.hostname AS host, d.pii_types AS pii_types ORDER BY d.sensitivity_score DESC

reports.title: Threat Intelligence by Severity
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) RETURN t.severity AS severity, count(*) AS threat_count ORDER BY CASE t.severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 4 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC

reports.title: Data Asset Sensitivity Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WITH CASE WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.8 THEN 'Very High' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.6 THEN 'High' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.4 THEN 'Medium' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.2 THEN 'Low' ELSE 'Very Low' END AS sensitivity_level RETURN sensitivity_level, count(*) AS asset_count ORDER BY asset_count DESC

reports.title: Recent Security Activity (Last 7 Days)
reports.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n.last_updated > datetime() - duration('P7D') WITH date(n.last_updated) AS activity_date, labels(n)[0] AS entity_type RETURN activity_date, entity_type, count(*) AS activity_count ORDER BY activity_date DESC

reports.title: PII Types in Data Assets
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE size(d.pii_types) > 0 UNWIND d.pii_types AS pii_type RETURN pii_type, count(*) AS occurrence_count ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC

reports.title: Average Asset Sensitivity by Host
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) WITH h, avg(d.sensitivity_score) AS avg_sensitivity ORDER BY avg_sensitivity DESC LIMIT 15 RETURN h.hostname AS hostname, round(avg_sensitivity * 100) / 100 AS average_sensitivity

reports.title: Crown Jewel Asset Relationships
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true})-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)<-[:AFFECTS]-(ac:ActionCard) RETURN d, h, v, ac LIMIT 50

reports.title: High-Risk PII Combinations
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE size(d.pii_types) >= 2 AND d.sensitivity_score >= 0.7 RETURN d.location_pseudonym AS asset_location, d.pii_types AS pii_combination, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity, d.crown_jewel AS is_crown_jewel ORDER BY d.sensitivity_score DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: Asset Scan Status Overview
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) RETURN d.scan_status AS scan_status, count(*) AS asset_count

reports.title: Attack Path Analysis
reports.query: MATCH path = (h:Host)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability)-[:EXPLOITED_BY]->(t:Threat) WITH path, h, v, t WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 RETURN path LIMIT 25

reports.title: Threat Impact vs Likelihood Matrix
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat)<-[:EXPLOITED_BY]-(v:Vulnerability)<-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]-(h:Host) WITH t, count(DISTINCT h) AS affected_hosts, avg(v.cvss) AS avg_cvss RETURN t.title AS threat_name, t.severity AS threat_severity, affected_hosts, round(avg_cvss * 10) / 10 AS average_cvss ORDER BY affected_hosts DESC, avg_cvss DESC LIMIT 15

reports.title: Threat Detection Timeline
reports.query: MATCH (t:Threat) WHERE t.first_seen IS NOT NULL WITH date(datetime(t.first_seen)) AS detection_date RETURN detection_date, count(*) AS threats_detected ORDER BY detection_date DESC LIMIT 30

reports.title: ActionCard Workflow Funnel
reports.query: MATCH (ac:ActionCard) WITH ac.status AS status, count(*) AS card_count, CASE ac.status WHEN 'received' THEN 1 WHEN 'pending' THEN 2 WHEN 'approved' THEN 3 WHEN 'executing' THEN 4 WHEN 'completed' THEN 5 WHEN 'rejected' THEN 6 WHEN 'failed' THEN 7 END AS sort_order RETURN status, card_count ORDER BY sort_order

reports.title: Analyst Workload Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (an:Analyst)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(ac:ActionCard) WITH an, count(ac) AS assigned_cards, collect(DISTINCT ac.status) AS card_statuses RETURN an.analyst_id AS analyst, assigned_cards, card_statuses ORDER BY assigned_cards DESC

reports.title: ActionCard Priority vs Status Matrix
reports.query: MATCH (ac:ActionCard) WHERE ac.metadata IS NOT NULL AND ac.metadata.priority IS NOT NULL RETURN ac.metadata.priority AS priority, ac.status AS status, count(*) AS card_count

reports.title: Workflow Completion Metrics
reports.query: MATCH (ac:ActionCard) WITH count(ac) AS total_cards, size([ac IN collect(ac) WHERE ac.status = 'completed']) AS completed_cards, size([ac IN collect(ac) WHERE ac.status IN ['rejected', 'failed']]) AS failed_cards RETURN total_cards, completed_cards, failed_cards, round((completed_cards * 100.0) / total_cards) AS completion_rate

reports.title: ActionCard Assignment Network
reports.query: MATCH (ac:ActionCard)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(an:Analyst) OPTIONAL MATCH (ac)-[:AFFECTS]->(target) RETURN ac, an, target LIMIT 40
